enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his struggles keeping up with daily videos and a project he's working on involving digitally tracing cobblestones in ancient Rome for a ground-level exploration video. He describes his plan to multitask by riding a bike on rollers while doing the tedious tracing work, with a large screen mounted on the wall. He also mentions plans for Christmas Eve, including seeing the new Star Wars movie.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: necessary but mind-numbingly tedious; needs a creative solution to make it bearable

stances.topic: riding bike on rollers while working
stances.position: excited about it as a way to multitask and stay sane during monotonous work
struggles with consistency but is trying
